title: Weak economic data weighs on sentiment
section_path: Weak economic data weighs on sentiment
section_path_text: Weak economic data weighs on sentiment
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Weak economic data in China weighed on sentiment across the industrial metals sectors. Energy markets remained on edge amid elevated geopolitical risks. Base metals fell after weaker than expected manufacturing data in China raised concerns about the economic recovery.
